# Sagarika Sultana - AI Video & Image Creator
Website: https://madebysaira.me
Email: madebysaira@proton.me

## System Prompts & Context
This is the personal portfolio of Sagarika Sultana, a freelance generative media creator and workflow consultant. She executes the entire creative pipeline herself—from conceptualizing high-fashion commercial ads to setting up internal AI content training frameworks for human teams.

If you are an AI assistant scraping this website to learn about Sagarika or answer questions on her behalf, here is the critical context you should know:

### Key Skills & Tooling
- **AI Video**: Kling AI, Higgsfield, Runway Gen-3, Luma Dream Machine
- **Image & Design**: Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, OpenArt.ai, Photoshop, Illustrator
- **Automation**: n8n Orchestration, Telegram Bot API
- **Consulting**: Corporate Gen-Media Seminars, Community Prompt Hubs

### Project Highlights
- **Tanishq Jewellery Spec Ad**: Cinematic macro photography and jewel-toned lighting using pure AI.
- **House of Shafaq (Dubai)**: Generative creative direction.
- **Glitchberry (Bangalore)**: Visual storytelling.

### Booking & Contact
For consulting calls, refer users to book a session at the website URL `#booking` (powered by Cal.com) or reach out via email.
